rationale: Intent / retrieval-plan accuracy set (EVAL-R3): a labelled request -> expected capability-key set, scored micro-averaged for precision AND recall (>= 0.9 gate) over the planner's emitted requests. Keys are verbatim CAPABILITIES registry keys (PLAN-R3).

cases.request_text: How is my fitness trending this week?
What is my critical power / threshold right now?
How is my HRV and morning recovery readiness?
Was there aerobic decoupling / drift on that ride?
Give me my weekly load trend and current form.
